referral_information.referred_by_name_org: Laura Chen, LCSW, UCI Health Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation
referral_information.title: Clinical Social Worker

income_and_employment.income: $1,984 per month (SSI disability and partial long-term disability benefits)
income_and_employment.partners_income: $2,150 per month (spouse’s part-time wages as a medical assistant)

history_and_problem_description.brief_history_nature_of_problem_line_1: In July 2023 I was involved in a freeway car accident on the 57 near Orange; another driver rear-ended us at high speed, and I sustained multiple fractures in my right leg (tibia and fibula), a shattered right ankle, and nerve damage that has significantly limited my ability to walk and bear weight.
history_and_problem_description.brief_history_nature_of_problem_line_2: I had two surgeries at UCI Medical Center, including placement of plates and screws, followed by a long hospitalization and then inpatient rehab; since then I have been using a standard walker and, more recently, a basic wheelchair borrowed from a church donation closet, but both are poorly fitted and cause pain in my shoulders, lower back, and my non-injured leg.
history_and_problem_description.brief_history_nature_of_problem_line_3: My rehab doctor and physical therapist have recommended a properly fitted lightweight wheelchair with elevating leg rests and a custom cushion to prevent pressure sores and help manage swelling, as well as outpatient physical therapy focused on strengthening and gait training, but my current insurance only covers a very basic chair and limited therapy visits, and we cannot afford the out-of-pocket upgrade costs or additional sessions on our own.

requested_service_and_provider.service_needed: Assistance with the out-of-pocket cost for a properly fitted lightweight manual wheelchair with elevating leg rests and pressure-relief cushion, as well as support for an additional 12 outpatient physical therapy sessions beyond what insurance will cover this year.
requested_service_and_provider.provider: UCI Health – Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation Clinic
